description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pre-commit-update that runs weekly and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should update pre-commit hooks in a ubuntu-latest job with write permissions to pull requests and repository contents. It should use a bash shell, generate a GitHub app token, check out the repository, set up Miniforge3 with a precommit environment, update pre-commit hooks, and create a pull request with the updates if the workflow runs on the mainline branch.
